title: poa nemoralis f. micrantha
intro: Poa nemoralis f. micrantha, a variety of the meadow grass or wood meadow-grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Poa nemoralis f. micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
